CREATE TABLE dt64_boundary(`timestamp` DateTime64(3, 'UTC'), `event_id` UInt8) ENGINE = TinyLog;
SELECT * FROM dt64_boundary WHERE timestamp = toDateTime64('1970-01-01 00:00:00', 3, 'UTC');
SELECT * FROM dt64_boundary WHERE timestamp = toDateTime64('2262-04-11 23:47:16', 9, 'UTC');
SELECT * FROM dt64_boundary WHERE timestamp = toDateTime64('1900-01-01 00:00:00', 8, 'UTC');
SELECT * FROM dt64_boundary WHERE timestamp = toDateTime64('2299-12-31 23:59:59.99999999', 8, 'UTC');
SELECT DISTINCT event_id FROM dt64_boundary WHERE timestamp BETWEEN toDateTime64('1900-01-01 00:00:00', 3, 'UTC') AND toDateTime64('2299-12-31 23:59:59.99999999', 8, 'UTC');
SELECT COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM dt64_boundary GROUP BY event_id;
SELECT AVG(toUnixTimestamp(timestamp)) AS average_timestamp FROM dt64_boundary;
CREATE TABLE dt64_join (`timestamp` DateTime64(3, 'Asia/Istanbul'), `event_id` UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
SELECT a.event_id, b.event_id FROM dt64_boundary AS a JOIN dt64_join AS b ON a.event_id = b.event_id WHERE a.timestamp > toDateTime64('1970-01-01 00:00:00', 3, 'UTC');
SELECT CONCAT(toString(timestamp), ' - ', toString(event_id)) AS event_details FROM dt64_boundary ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT event_id, COUNT(*) as total FROM dt64_boundary GROUP BY event_id HAVING total > 1;
SELECT toDateTime64(timestamp, 3, 'Europe/Paris') AS paris_time, toDateTime64(timestamp, 3, 'Asia/Istanbul') AS istanbul_time FROM dt64_boundary WHERE event_id = 1;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE dt64_temp AS SELECT * FROM dt64_boundary WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT * FROM dt64_temp WHERE timestamp < toDateTime64('2262-04-11 23:47:16', 9, 'UTC');
